globalErrorBoundary.title: Unexpected error
globalErrorBoundary.description: Something went wrong. Please reload the page or try again later.

install.unavailable: App cannot be installed right now.

installReminder.title: Add CulinaSync to your home screen
installReminder.description: Install the app for faster access, offline usage, and a steadier kitchen workflow.

pwaUpdate.title: Update ready
pwaUpdate.description: A new version has been installed and is ready after reloading.

error.invalidApiKey: The API key is invalid. Please check it under Settings → API Key.
error.networkError: The AI service could not be reached. Please check your internet connection.
error.rateLimited: Too many requests to the AI service. Please wait a moment.
error.invalidResponse: The AI service returned an invalid response. Please try again.
error.unexpected: An unexpected error occurred with the AI service.
error.noApiKey: No API key configured. Please enter your Gemini API key under Settings.
error.emptyResponse: The AI returned an empty response.
